# What are Functions

Azion Edge Functions are serverless functions that run on the Azion edge network, close to your users. They allow you to execute custom logic at the edge — without managing servers, with near-zero latency and no cold starts.

Functions are written in JavaScript (and optionally WebAssembly) and are executed within the Azion Runtime, a V8-based environment optimized for edge computing.

This page is a placeholder and will be expanded with detailed documentation.
